Headline: 52 Kedzie Temporary Northbound Reroute near Kedzie/45th
ShortDescription: Northbound 52 Kedzie buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 47th, Drake, Archer and Kedzie: due to, street blockage near Kedzie/45th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #52 Kedzie buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 47th, Drake, Archer and Kedzie: due to, street blockage near Kedzie/45th.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
